info.name: EC2 job.server (Contact360)
info.description:
HTTP collection for [`EC2/job.server`](../../../EC2/job.server) â€” Gin API, **MongoDB** (`linkedin_jobs`, `apify_runs`), **Redis** (Asynq queues + export job status), outbound **Apify** + **Connectra (sync.server)**.

Parity: [`ROUTE-CLIENT-MATRIX.md`](../endpoints/job.server/ROUTE-CLIENT-MATRIX.md), gateway [`job_server_client.py`](../../../contact360.io/api/app/clients/job_server_client.py).

---

## Request flow (high level)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Client[HTTP_client] --> Gin[Gin_router]
  Gin --> MW[Middleware_chain]
  MW --> V1[/api/v1]
  V1 --> Mongo[(MongoDB)]
  V1 --> Redis[(Redis)]
  V1 --> Apify[Apify_API]
  V1 --> Sync[Connectra_sync.server]
  Redis --> Worker[Asynq_worker_apify_export]
```

---

## Global middleware (order)

| Order | Middleware | Behavior |
| ----- | ---------- | -------- |
| 1 | `RequestID` | Sets or echoes **`X-Request-ID`** (UUID) on response. |
| 2 | `RequestLogger` | Structured log: method, path, status, duration, request_id. |
| 3 | `gin.Recovery` | Panic recovery. |
| 4 | `cors.Default()` | Permissive CORS. |
| **v1 group** | `APIKeyMiddleware` | See **Auth** below. |

**`GET /health`** is registered **outside** `/api/v1` â€” **no** API key, still gets RequestID + logger + recovery + CORS.

---

## Auth (`/api/v1/*`)

- If **`API_KEY`** env is **non-empty**: require header **`X-API-Key`** to match; else **401** `{ "detail": "invalid or missing API key" }`.
- If **`API_KEY`** is **empty**: middleware **allows** all requests (warns in logs in non-development). **`APP_ENV=production` + empty `API_KEY`** â†’ process **exits on startup** (`main.go`).

---

## Databases & async

| Store | Use |
| ----- | --- |
| **Mongo** `linkedin_jobs` | Job listings, stats, company grouping, Connectra read-through joins. Indexes: `linkedin_job_id` unique, `apify_run_id`, `company_linkedin_url`, `company_uuid`, `posted_at` desc. |
| **Mongo** `apify_runs` | Scrape runs; `run_id` unique; `client_scrape_job_id` indexed. |
| **Redis** | Asynq broker; **export** status blobs (`worker.SetExportStatus` / `GetExportStatus`). |
| **Asynq** | `POST /runs` â†’ queue **`apify`** task `apify:start_scrape`. `POST /jobs/export` â†’ queue **`export`** task `export:jobs`. |

---

## JSON error shapes

- Most handler errors: **`{ "detail": "â€¦" }`** (`abortJSON` / `abortNotFound` / `abortBadRequest`).
- **500** in **Gin release mode** (`GIN_MODE=release` or `APP_ENV=production`): detail is generic **`internal server error`** (no leak).
- Some Connectra guard responses: **`{ "success": false, "detail": "â€¦" }`** with **503** / **409**.

---

## Status code quick reference

| Code | Typical cases |
| ---- | ---------------- |
| **200** | Successful JSON body. |
| **202** | `POST /api/v1/runs` scrape enqueued; `POST /api/v1/jobs/export` export enqueued. |
| **400** | Bad JSON, validation (`POST /runs`, `POST /jobs/export`), missing export id, empty `company_uuid` path. |
| **401** | Missing/wrong `X-API-Key` when `API_KEY` is set. |
| **404** | Job, run, Connectra company, or export status not found. |
| **409** | Job exists but **no `company_uuid`** (Connectra job routes). |
| **502** | Apify error on run refresh; Connectra HTTP/transport failures. |
| **503** | `/health` degraded; Apify client nil on refresh; Connectra not configured. |
| **500** | Mongo/Redis errors, enqueue failures, unexpected server errors. |

---

## Base URL

`{{base_url}}` (default `http://localhost:9900`).

item.name: Health
item.description: Root router only. **No** `X-API-Key`. Pings Mongo + Redis (5s timeout). **`status`**: `ok` | `degraded`. HTTP **503** when degraded.

request.description:
Optional: send **`X-Request-ID`** to correlate logs; echoed on response if set.

**200** all backends reachable.
**503** one or both pings failed â€” body still includes `mongo` / `redis` fields (error string or `ok`).

item.name: Auth examples
item.description: When **`API_KEY`** is configured, all `/api/v1/*` calls need **`X-API-Key`**. **401** if missing or wrong.

item.name: GET /api/v1/jobs â€” missing X-API-Key (401 when API_KEY set)

request.description: Intentionally **no** `X-API-Key`. Expect **401** only when the server has a non-empty `API_KEY`.

item.name: Jobs
item.description: Mongo **`linkedin_jobs`**. List filters map to repository regex / range / exact `apify_run_id` (see `JobListFilter`).

request.description:
**Query (all optional):** `limit` (default 25, max 200), `offset`, `title`, `company`, `location`, `employment_type`, `seniority` (regex on `seniority_level`), `function` (regex on `function_category_v2`), `posted_after`, `posted_before` (YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339), **`run_id`** (exact **`apify_run_id`**).

**200:** `success`, `data`, `total`, `limit`, `offset`.
**500:** `{ "detail" }` on DB error (generic in release mode).

No query params.

**200:** `success`, `total_jobs`, `jobs_with_company`.
**500** on DB error.

**Path:** `:id` = `linkedin_job_id` in Mongo.

**200:** `{ success, data: LinkedInJob }`.
**404:** `{ "detail": "job not found" }`.

item.name: Jobs export (async)
item.description:
**Connectra + Asynq + Redis.** Requires **`ConnectraClient`** (`CONNECTRA_BASE_URL` + `CONNECTRA_API_KEY`). Builds Excel via worker; poll **`GET .../export/status/:id`** for `pending` â†’ `completed` / `failed`.

**503** if Connectra not configured on job.server.

request.description:
**Body:** `{ "ids": [ "linkedin_job_id", â€¦ ] }` â€” non-empty, deduplicated server-side.

**202:** `success`, `message`, `export_job_id`, `asynq_task_id`, `ids_requested`, `ids_unique`, `status_url`.
**400** invalid JSON or empty `ids`.
**500** enqueue failure.

response.name: 202 Accepted
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Export job queued. Poll the status endpoint to track progress.",
  "export_job_id": "â€¦",
  "asynq_task_id": "â€¦",
  "ids_requested": 1,
  "ids_unique": 1,
  "status_url": "/api/v1/jobs/export/status/â€¦"
}

request.description:
Poll export progress.

**200:** `success`, `export_job_id`, `status`, `filename`, `file_path`, `error`, `stats`, `created_at`, `updated_at`.
**400** empty path id.
**404** unknown or expired job in Redis.

item.name: Runs
item.description:
Mongo **`apify_runs`**. **`POST /api/v1/runs`** enqueues Asynq **`apify:start_scrape`** on queue **`apify`** (response **202**).

**Route order:** `GET /runs/:id/refresh` is registered **before** `GET /runs/:id` so `refresh` is not captured as an id.

request.description:
**Query:** `limit` (default 50), **`offset`** (default 0), **`client_scrape_job_id`** (optional â€” filter runs linked to gateway `scrape_jobs.id`).

**200:** `success`, `data` (array), **`total`**, `limit`, `offset`.
**500** on DB error.

Poll **Apify** for run status; update Mongo `status` + `dataset_id`.

**200:** `success`, `data` (updated run doc), `apify_status`, `apify_dataset`.
**404** run not in Mongo.
**503** Apify client unavailable (`ApifyClient` nil).
**502** Apify HTTP error.
**500** Mongo update failure.

**Path:** Apify run id (`run_id` in Mongo).

**200:** `{ success, data }`.
**404:** `{ "detail": "run not found" }`.

**JSON body** (`tasks.StartScrapePayload`):
- `trigger` â€” default **`api`** if empty after unmarshal; **`cron`** may omit URLs; other triggers require **â‰Ą1 non-empty** URL after trim.
- `urls` â€” LinkedIn search URLs.
- `count` â€” **0 â‰¤ count â‰¤ 10000**.
- `scrapeCompany`, `splitByLocation` â€” bools.
- **`clientScrapeJobId`** â€” optional gateway `scrape_jobs.id` (UUID string).

**Non-empty JSON required** (whitespace-only body â†’ **400**). Malformed JSON â†’ **400**. Validation errors â†’ **400** with message in `detail`.

**202:** `success`, `message`, `task_id`, `queue` (e.g. `apify`).
**500** Asynq enqueue failure.

response.name: 400 Bad Request (validation)

item.name: Companies
item.description: Distinct companies and jobs-by-company from **Mongo** (aggregations / queries on `linkedin_jobs`). Not the same as Connectra company **`/record`**.

request.description:
**Query:** `limit` (default 100).

**200:** `{ success, data }` â€” distinct company groups from repo aggregation.
**500** on error.

**Path:** `company_uuid` on job documents.
**Query:** `limit` (default 50).

**200:** `{ success, data: [ LinkedInJob â€¦ ] }` (may be empty array).
**500** on error.

item.name: Connectra (sync via job.server)
item.description:
Handlers: `job_connectra_handlers.go`, `company_connectra_handlers.go`. Proxies **sync.server** when `CONNECTRA_BASE_URL` + `CONNECTRA_API_KEY` set.

**Shared query (contacts):** `page` (default 1, **max 10**), `limit` (default 25, **max 100**), `populate_company` (default true).

**Job contacts only:** `include_poster` (default true).

**Status quick ref:** **503** Connectra unset; **409** job missing `company_uuid`; **404** job or Connectra company not found; **502** upstream/transport; **400** empty `company_uuid` on company routes.

request.description: VQL contact search for the job's `company_uuid`. **200** `data`: `contacts`, `job_poster_contact` (nullable), `total`.

query.description: Fetch job poster contact when UUID present

response.name: 409 Conflict (no company_uuid)

request.description: Connectra `GET /companies/{uuid}` for the job's `company_uuid`. **200** `data`: `{ "job": â€¦, "company": â€¦ }`. **409** if no `company_uuid` on job. **404** if Connectra returns not found.

response.name: 503 Connectra not configured

request.description: VQL contacts for Connectra company UUID. **200** `data`: `contacts`, `total`. No `include_poster` (job-only).
Single Connectra company record. **200** `data` is the company object. **400** if path uuid empty.
